name: Peoplein Limited
analysis: PPE has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 25% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$0.6800. Trade idea: entry A$0.7100, stop A$0.6138, target A$0.8000 (0.94:1) — then trail it.
